hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git (push|commit).*(main|master)"; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Direct commits to main blocked. Create a feature branch: git checkout -b feature/your-feature\"}"; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'PROMPT=$(cat | jq -r ".prompt // empty"); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE "^(implement|build|code|refactor|rewrite|create src)"; then echo "{\"continue\":true,\"additionalContext\":\"PLANNING CHECKPOINT: Before implementing, check that a spec exists in planning/specs/. If not, create one first. Use the brainstorm-spec-tasks workflow.\"}"; fi; exit 0'
